title: Age of Brass SMP
description: Reinvent industrial production, electrical grids, flight, and the internet in a way you find most palatable.
body:
**Age of Brass** is a strongly integrated technology modpack centered on _Create_, intended and recommended to be used for multiplayer servers.

From factories and towns powered by wind and water, to ones powered by steam and, later on, electricity, build up industry and history with your friends in a lightly inhabited world.


<details>
<summary>Hosting this?</summary>

There are 3 mods that like a separate port opened for them:
- VoiceChat
- BlueMap
- Analog Audio

Under the serverside version of the modpack, a `suggested-jvm.opts` file is maintained. We advise using the options from it if you have control of the server's JVM runtime.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Disclaimer</summary>

Friends and required server hosting not included.

</details>
